---
title: "Landscape evolution of ephemeral catchments"
collection: portfolio
author_profile: false
---

{% include custom-header.html %}

<style>
  /* Hide auto-generated h1 title */
  .page__title,
  .page__inner-wrap h1:first-of-type,
  article h1:first-of-type {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Hero section — full-width, flush below fixed header */
  .p1-hero-wrap {
    margin-top: 33vh;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 67vh;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .p1-hero {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center center;
  }

  /* Title overlaid on right side of image */
  .p1-title {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    right: 60px;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    color: #ffffff;
    font-size: 1em;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    text-decoration: none;
    max-width: 320px;
    text-align: right;
    line-height: 1.5;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }

  /* Content area */
  .p1-content {
    padding: 40px 60px 80px 60px;
    max-width: 860px;
    color: #222;
    font-size: 1em;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  .p1-content ul { margin-top: 8px; padding-left: 20px; }
  .p1-content li { margin-bottom: 6px; }
</style>

<div class="p1-hero-wrap">
  <img class="p1-hero" src="/images/hs_gullise.jpg" alt="Landscape evolution of ephemeral catchments">
  <p class="p1-title">Landscape evolution of ephemeral catchments</p>
</div>

<div class="p1-content">
  <p>Publications related to this project:</p>
  <ul>
    <li>Shmilovitz, Y., Rossi, M. W., &amp; Tucker, G. E. (2025). Multi&#8209;century erosion and landscape evolution of ephemeral catchments in response to sub&#8209;daily rainfall distribution changes. <em>Geophysical Research Letters</em>, 52(5), e2024GL113179.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
